query: repository picker dropdown quick search popover

results.title: SingleCombobox selected text and reopen bug fix
results.content: Fixed the new raw SingleCombobox so the selected item text is visible again when the search input is empty, and clicking the combobox reliably reopens the popup. The fix swaps the combobox wrapper from PopoverTrigger to PopoverAnchor to avoid trigger-toggle conflicts, clears single-mode search input on selection, and overlays the selected label in the input area when idle.

results.title: Raw combobox input refocus after open/select
results.content: Fixed src/shared/components/ui/raw-combobox.tsx so popover open no longer steals focus from the search input. Added inputRef + focusInput helper, prevented Radix popover auto-focus in RawCombobox content, focused input when clicking the trigger wrapper, and refocused after onValueChange/onValuesChange so users can keep searching after selecting an item.

results.title: Single combobox open trigger selected text
results.content: Adjusted src/shared/components/ui/raw-combobox.tsx so a selected single-combobox item remains visible in the trigger while the popup is open. The trigger now shows the selected label through the input placeholder when open and keeps the absolute overlay only when closed, avoiding hidden text while preserving empty search behavior.

results.title: CitySelect remote search hidden by client filter
results.content: In TourOverviewForm CitySelect, react-select was still applying its own client-side filtering while options were already server-filtered. Searching 'saigon' returned API items whose labels did not literally contain the typed term, so the open menu stayed empty until closing/reopening reset the input. Fix: set filterOption={() => true} for the remote-search select and keep option mapping memoized.

results.title: Combobox supports virtualization and async debounce search
results.content: Enhanced src/shared/components/ui/combobox.tsx with virtualized dropdown rendering using react-window and async search mode via onSearch + debounceMs. Local filtering still works by default; async mode disables local filtering and debounces remote queries. Added test-page demos for a 200-item virtualized list and a simulated async API search in src/app/(test)/test/page.tsx.
